_comment: TEMPLATE (reference only) - do not point the script at this file. Copy blocks into sources.json, delete the ones you don't use. Every entry has type 'jobhive'; only 'ats' and 'slug' change. Run 'python job_watcher.py platforms' for the full platform list. Keep each 'name' unique.
name: IGNORE THIS FIRST ENTRY

_comment: GREENHOUSE - slug is the token in boards.greenhouse.io/<slug>
name: Example (Greenhouse)

_comment: WORKDAY - slug is usually the tenant (the subdomain before .wdN.myworkdayjobs.com). If a company won't resolve, its site name may also be needed; confirm per company.
name: Example (Workday)

_comment: SUCCESSFACTORS - slug identifies the company's SF career site; confirm per company
name: Example (SuccessFactors)

_comment: PHENOM - powers many careers.<company>.com sites. slug identifies the Phenom site; confirm per company
name: Example (Phenom)

_comment: ICIMS - slug identifies the iCIMS customer/portal; confirm per company
name: Example (iCIMS)

_comment: OTHER - jobhive supports ~47 platforms (Oracle, Taleo, Workable, Recruitee, BambooHR, Eightfold, Avature, JazzHR, ...). Run 'python job_watcher.py platforms' and use the same shape: set 'ats' and 'slug'.
name: Example (any other ATS)
